LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS MARTINA QUINN AND MIKHAIL AFENDIKOV'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT [CCP 473] IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998 ================================================ AFTER HEARING THE COURT RULES AS FOLLOWS: COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FINAL. DEFENDANTS MARTINA QUINN AND MIKHAIL AFENDIKOV'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT [CCP 473]. DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS' ATTORNEYS' HAVE PRESENTED SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE OF EXCUSABLE NEGLECT TO WARRANT RELIEF. HOWEVER, THE COURT DIRECTS PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO PRESENT THE COURT WITH AN ATTORNEY FEE REQUEST IN THAT THE COURT WILL ORDER THAT DEFENDANTS BE REQUIRED TO PAY COSTS OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL'S WORK ON THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. THE COURT OVERRULES PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS NUMBERS 1 TO 3, SUSTAINS OBJECTION NUMBER 4. COURT AWARDS SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $575.00 TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL. DEFENDANT'S PRIOR ATTORNEY SCHINNER AND DEFENDANT QUINN TO EACH PAY HALF OF THAT AMOUNT TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL BY JULY 30, 2011.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS Denied. There is a triable issue under the 'sham guaranty defense' whether the defendants were true guarantors or principal obligors in guarantors' guise. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Default [Ccp 473]
Off Calendar Jun-20-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Michael G. Schinner, Esq., The Schinner Law Group 369-9050 for defendant Mikhail Afendikov;
Stephen W. Steelman, Esq., Law Office of Stephen W. Steelman 613-1283 specially appearing (for defts for limited purpose re 473 motion).
John H. Wunsch, Office of the General Counsel 626-965-9465 for Plaintiff and opposing party

Argued and DEFENDANTS MARTINA QUINN AND MIKHAIL AFENDIKOV'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Default [Ccp 473] is taken under submission.
(302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
=======================================================================================
AFTER HEARING THE COURT RULES AS FOLLOWS:
COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FINAL. DEFENDANTS MARTINA QUINN AND MIKHAIL AFENDIKOV'S Motion For Relief From Default [CCP 473]. DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS' ATTORNEYS' HAVE PRESENTED SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE OF EXCUSABLE NEGLECT TO WARRANT RELIEF. HOWEVER, THE COURT DIRECTS PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO PRESENT THE COURT WITH AN ATTORNEY FEE REQUEST IN THAT THE COURT WILL ORDER THAT DEFENDANTS' BE REQUIRED TO PAY COSTS OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL'S WORK ON THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
THE COURT OVERRULES PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS NUMBERS 1 TO 3. SUSTAINS OBJECTION NUMBER 4.
COURT AWARDS SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $575.00 TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL.
DEFENDANT'S PRIOR ATTORNEYS SCHINNER AND DEFENDANT QUINN TO EACH PAY HALF OF THAT AMOUNT TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL BY JULY 30, 2011.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees After Judgment, Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Jun-02-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES AFTER JUDGMENT.

APPEARANCES: John H. Wunsch, Office of the General Counsel 626/965-9465 for pltf & moving party (appearing via CourtCall); Michael G. Schinner, Esq. of The Schinner Law Group 369-9050 for deft Mikhail Afendikov; Stephen W. Steelman, Esq. of the Law Office of Stephen W.
